reference_images.label: cockatiel_reference_photo
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Echo's crest, cheek patch placement, beak silhouette, and real cockatiel anatomy for the pet-care presentation.

reference_images.label: pico_8_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the constrained 128x128 retro framing and tiny handheld-style readability required by the game.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds crisp nearest-neighbor pixel clusters, flat shading, and single-pixel outline discipline across world, pet, prop, and HUD assets.

bevy_constraints.sprite_pipeline: Use Bevy 2D with ImagePlugin::default_nearest(), SpriteBundle for world and prop art, TextureAtlasLayout plus SpriteSheetBundle for animated character states, and ImageBundle for HUD overlays.
bevy_constraints.ecs_model: Organize art handles with typed resources/components such as EchoState, CageLayer, FeedState, and HappinessHud so gameplay swaps visuals by stable task identity rather than ad-hoc pointers.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Preload every texture through AssetServer in a dedicated Loading state and store handles in typed resources keyed by asset_key before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Run visual updates on a fixed 60 FPS gameplay cadence while sprite-sheet animation timers use their declared per-asset fps.
Nearest-neighbor sampling and whole-pixel transform snapping are mandatory so 128x128 output remains crisp on mobile and web.
Keep gameplay state transitions separate from art bundle definitions so care tuning can swap visuals without schema drift.

mechanic_coverage.label: Feed Care Loop
mechanic_coverage.description: Echo remains visible in the cage, requests seed when hungry, and recovers happiness after the bowl is replenished.

mechanic_coverage.label: Ambient Pet Watch Loop
mechanic_coverage.description: The player observes Echo inside a calm cage scene while the happiness meter stays readable as a persistent relationship indicator.
